name: @entl/node
description: The entl engine (git + GitHub -> DuckDB) as an in-process Node/Bun native addon.

scripts.gen: cargo run -q -p fluessig --bin fluessig-gen -- ../fluessig/catalog.json ../entl-core/src/schema_gen.rs --docs ../fluessig/schema_docs.json --py-models ../entl-python/python/entl/models.py --ts-tables tables.gen.ts --ts-drizzle schema.gen.ts --api ../fluessig/api.json --node src/generated.rs --python ../entl-python/src/generated.rs --ruby ../entl-ruby/src/generated.rs
